message:
feat(cass): implement cass CLI wrapper for session search/query

Add a typed API wrapper for the cass (coding_agent_session_search) CLI,
following the same pattern as the caut wrapper:

- CassClient with builder pattern (timeout, output limits, binary path)
- search() method for session search with filters (agent, workspace, days)
- query() method for viewing specific session lines with context
- status() method for health checks
- Robust error handling: NotInstalled, Timeout, NonZeroExit, InvalidJson
- Version-tolerant JSON parsing with serde (ignores unknown fields)
- Redacted error previews (never expose secrets)
- Comprehensive unit tests for parsing

Implements wa-nu4.2.4.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
